title: Old dual-destination shape: two production routes instead of a router
differs: No dev Route. Two same-filter production Routes instead of an Output Router: first to S3 with the Final flag off, then to Splunk with the Final flag on.
description: PROD dual destination shape (Splunk + S3): two same-filter routes, prod-a Final flag off to fs-s3, prod-b Final flag on to fs-prod. Both should get all 1000.
